10503164.title: Operation Repo
10503164.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10609255.title: Operation Repo
10609255.description: Language difficulties complicate a tense repo when the team tries to seize a tourist bus. Plus, when a knucklehead attacks Matt will pepper spray be applied to the situation?

10609617.title: Operation Repo
10609617.description: Matt and Froy trick some trusting kids into giving up the keys to their Porsche. Plus, a repo hits a wall when Sonyah finds the van they're after has already been seized by cops.
